mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CARBON_AMOUNT), 0) AS CARBON_REDUCTION_TON, ROUND((SUM(CARBON_AMOUNT) * 1000) / 6.6, -6) / 10000000 AS TREE_EQUIVALENT_COUNT, ROUND(ROUND(SUM(DISTANCE)/1000), 0) AS TOTAL_DISTANCE_KM, ROUND(SUM(DISTANCE) / 40075, 0) AS EARTH_ROUNDS_EQUIVALENT, ROUND(SUM(USAGE_MINUTE) / 60, 0) AS TOTAL_USAGE_HOURS FROM SEOUL_BIKE

SELECT TRIM(SUBSTR(RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME, INSTR(RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME, '.') + 1)) AS TOP_STATION_NAME, SUM(NUM_OF_USES) AS TOP_STATION_RENT_COUNT FROM SEOUL_BIKE WHERE RENTAL_DATE = TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12)) GROUP BY RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME ORDER BY TOP_STATION_RENT_COUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT PERIOD_LABEL, RENT_COUNT FROM DASHBOARD_USAGE_TREND WHERE YEAR_VAL = #{year} ORDER BY PERIOD_ORDER

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT STATION_NAME, USER_COUNT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY USER_COUNT DESC) AS RANK_NO FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_USAGE WHERE YEAR_VAL = #{year} AND (#{month} IS NULL OR MONTH_VAL = #{month}) ) WHERE RANK_NO <= NVL(#{limit}, 5) ORDER BY RANK_NO
SELECT MALE_PERCENT, FEMALE_PERCENT FROM DASHBOARD_GENDER_RATIO WHERE YEAR_VAL = #{year}
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT REGION_NAME, USAGE_COUNT, USAGE_PERCENT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY USAGE_COUNT DESC) AS RANK_NO FROM DASHBOARD_REGION_USAGE WHERE YEAR_VAL = #{year} ) ORDER BY RANK_NO
SELECT SEASON_NAME, USAGE_COUNT, USAGE_PERCENT FROM DASHBOARD_SEASON_USAGE WHERE YEAR_VAL = #{year} ORDER BY SEASON_ORDER

SELECT O.STATION_ID, O.STATION_NAME, M.REGION_NAME, O.LATITUDE, O.LONGITUDE, O.OCCUPANCY_RATE, CASE WHEN O.OCCUPANCY_RATE > NVL(#{occupancyThreshold}, 100) THEN 'OVER' ELSE 'UNDER' END AS OCCUPANCY_STATUS FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY O JOIN STATION_REGION_MAP M ON O.STATION_ID = M.STATION_ID WHERE O.LAST_UPDATED_AT = ( SELECT MAX(LAST_UPDATED_AT) FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY ) AND (#{regionName} IS NULL OR M.REGION_NAME = #{regionName})

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT O.STATION_ID, O.STATION_NAME, M.REGION_NAME, O.LATITUDE, O.LONGITUDE, O.OCCUPANCY_RATE, CASE WHEN O.OCCUPANCY_RATE > NVL(#{occupancyThreshold}, 100) THEN 'OVER' ELSE 'UNDER' END AS OCCUPANCY_STATUS FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY O JOIN STATION_REGION_MAP M ON O.STATION_ID = M.STATION_ID WHERE O.LAST_UPDATED_AT = ( SELECT MAX(LAST_UPDATED_AT) FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY ) AND M.REGION_NAME = #{regionName} ORDER BY O.OCCUPANCY_RATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= NVL(#{limit}, 5)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT O.STATION_ID, O.STATION_NAME, M.REGION_NAME, O.LATITUDE, O.LONGITUDE, O.OCCUPANCY_RATE, CASE WHEN O.OCCUPANCY_RATE > NVL(#{occupancyThreshold}, 100) THEN 'OVER' ELSE 'UNDER' END AS OCCUPANCY_STATUS FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY O JOIN STATION_REGION_MAP M ON O.STATION_ID = M.STATION_ID WHERE O.LAST_UPDATED_AT = ( SELECT MAX(LAST_UPDATED_AT) FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY ) AND M.REGION_NAME = #{regionName} ORDER BY O.OCCUPANCY_RATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= NVL(#{limit}, 5)

SELECT O.STATION_ID, O.STATION_NAME, M.REGION_NAME, O.LATITUDE, O.LONGITUDE, O.OCCUPANCY_RATE, 'OVER' AS OCCUPANCY_STATUS FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY O JOIN STATION_REGION_MAP M ON O.STATION_ID = M.STATION_ID WHERE O.LAST_UPDATED_AT = ( SELECT MAX(LAST_UPDATED_AT) FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY ) AND M.REGION_NAME = #{regionName} AND O.OCCUPANCY_RATE > NVL(#{occupancyThreshold}, 100) ORDER BY O.OCCUPANCY_RATE DESC

SELECT O.STATION_ID, O.STATION_NAME, M.REGION_NAME, O.LATITUDE, O.LONGITUDE, O.OCCUPANCY_RATE, 'UNDER' AS OCCUPANCY_STATUS FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY O JOIN STATION_REGION_MAP M ON O.STATION_ID = M.STATION_ID WHERE O.LAST_UPDATED_AT = ( SELECT MAX(LAST_UPDATED_AT) FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY ) AND M.REGION_NAME = #{regionName} AND O.OCCUPANCY_RATE <= NVL(#{occupancyThreshold}, 100) ORDER BY O.OCCUPANCY_RATE ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT O.STATION_ID, O.STATION_NAME, M.REGION_NAME, O.LATITUDE, O.LONGITUDE, O.OCCUPANCY_RATE, 'OVER' AS OCCUPANCY_STATUS FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY O JOIN STATION_REGION_MAP M ON O.STATION_ID = M.STATION_ID WHERE O.LAST_UPDATED_AT = ( SELECT MAX(LAST_UPDATED_AT) FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY ) AND O.OCCUPANCY_RATE > NVL(#{occupancyThreshold}, 100) AND (#{regionName} IS NULL OR M.REGION_NAME = #{regionName}) ORDER BY O.OCCUPANCY_RATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= NVL(#{limit}, 4)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT O.STATION_ID, O.STATION_NAME, M.REGION_NAME, O.LATITUDE, O.LONGITUDE, O.OCCUPANCY_RATE, 'UNDER' AS OCCUPANCY_STATUS FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY O JOIN STATION_REGION_MAP M ON O.STATION_ID = M.STATION_ID WHERE O.LAST_UPDATED_AT = ( SELECT MAX(LAST_UPDATED_AT) FROM DASHBOARD_STATION_OCCUPANCY ) AND O.OCCUPANCY_RATE <= NVL(#{occupancyThreshold}, 100) AND (#{regionName} IS NULL OR M.REGION_NAME = #{regionName}) ORDER BY O.OCCUPANCY_RATE ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= NVL(#{limit}, 4)
